name: MCPollinations
what_it_does: MCP server integrating Pollinations.ai — a free, no-API-key AI generation platform — enabling agents to generate images, text, and audio without authentication or cost. Pollinations.ai provides free access to open-source models (Stable Diffusion, Flux, and others) for image generation, text completion, and music creation through simple URL-based API calls.
use_cases: Generating images from text descriptions without API keys from creative agents
Creating visual content for prototyping from design assistance agents
Generating music and audio from text prompts from multimedia agents
Rapid AI content generation experimentation without account setup
not_for: Production applications requiring consistent quality or SLA guarantees
Teams with commercial use cases requiring licensing clarity for generated content
High-volume generation workflows (free service has implicit rate limits)
best_when: A developer wants to experiment with AI image or audio generation without API keys or costs — Pollinations.ai is the easiest entry point for free AI generation in agent workflows.
avoid_when: You need commercial-grade quality, consistent uptime, or clear licensing for generated content — use DALL-E, Midjourney, or Stability AI paid APIs for production use.

auth.notes: No authentication required — Pollinations.ai is completely free with no API key needed. Just use the URL-based API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Completely free — Pollinations.ai operates as a free public service
pricing.notes: Free with no hidden costs. Pollinations.ai is a non-profit-aligned project providing free AI generation. Community-maintained MCP wrapper.

performance.rate_limits: Implicit rate limits on free service; may throttle heavy usage

known_agent_gotchas: Free service with no SLA — may experience downtime or slowness during peak usage
Generated content licensing is unclear — review Pollinations.ai terms for commercial use
Content moderation is limited — free service may generate content flagged by other platforms
Image generation quality is adequate for prototyping but may not meet production standards
agent_readiness.security_notes: No credentials required — minimal security risk from this MCP itself. Generated content sent over HTTPS. Prompt content sent to Pollinations.ai servers. Avoid generating content with sensitive business data in prompts.

security_score_components.security_notes: No credentials. HTTPS. Prompts sent to Pollinations.ai — avoid confidential content in prompts. Generated images may contain watermarks.
